summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Territory Atlas iteration 4 - Per-layer density isolation feature. All backend APIs (7/7 tests passed). All frontend features working correctly: per-layer density rendering, layer toggle isolation, color picker, hover tooltips, click popups, analytics updates, point markers, clustering, and radius circles.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/data/city returns city records with proper structure (PASS)
Backend: GET /api/data/wheat returns wheat data with Acres layer (PASS)
Backend: GET /api/analytics/top-zones returns aggregated top states (PASS)
Backend: Analytics with layer filter works (PASS)
Backend: Data integrity - all datasets have records (PASS)
Frontend: All density layers ON - map shows combined choropleth with purple Acres dominant (PASS)
Frontend: Toggle OFF Acres - purple disappears, yellow/green/teal counties clearly visible (PASS)
Frontend: Toggle OFF all density layers except 1000-plus Acre Growers - only yellow shading visible (PASS)
Frontend: Toggle OFF all density layers - county choropleth disappears, only point markers visible (PASS)
Frontend: Toggle density layers back ON - choropleth reappears (PASS)
Frontend: Color picker works - changing Acres color updates just that layer's choropleth (PASS)
Frontend: Click popup shows per-layer breakdown with only active layers shown (PASS)
Frontend: Hover tooltip shows per-layer detail for county (PASS)
Frontend: Analytics panel updates when density layers toggled - Total: 37M (all) -> 28K (no Acres) (PASS)
Frontend: Point markers and clustering work correctly (PASS)
Frontend: Radius circles work when toggled on (25mi/50mi/100mi options) (PASS)
test_credentials: No authentication required. Mapbox token configured in .env
seed_data_creation: Data already loaded in MongoDB from previous session - city records, county records, wheat data with Acres layer
context_for_next_testing_agent: Per-layer density isolation feature fully working. Key implementation: MapboxVisualization.js creates separate Mapbox fill layers per active density layer (county-fill-acres, county-fill-1000_plus_acre_growers, etc.). Each layer uses its own color and independently normalized opacity via log-scaled intensity. Analytics Total changes dramatically when Acres is toggled: ~37M (all layers) vs ~28K (without Acres). Key data-testids: layer-toggle-{name}, color-picker-{name}, hover-tooltip, map-popup, radius-toggle-{name}, radius-miles-{name}-{miles}.

per_layer_density_isolation.separate_mapbox_layers: Each density layer renders as its own Mapbox fill layer with slugified ID (county-fill-acres, county-fill-1000_plus_acre_growers, etc.)
per_layer_density_isolation.independent_normalization: Each layer uses log-scaled intensity normalization based on its own max value
per_layer_density_isolation.layer_toggle_isolation: Toggling Acres OFF reveals yellow/green/teal layers that were previously drowned by purple

layer_controls.switch_toggle: Works correctly for all density layers
layer_controls.color_picker: 15 preset colors, updates map choropleth in real-time
layer_controls.inactive_opacity: Grayed out appearance when layer is OFF

map_interactions.hover_tooltip: Shows county name and per-layer breakdown (only active layers)
map_interactions.click_popup: Shows detailed breakdown with colored dots (only active layers)
map_interactions.radius_circles: 25mi/50mi/100mi options for Feed Mills, Grain Fumigation, Customers
